# GitHub repository settings (paste in Settings → General → About)

Description:
WCAG-first CSS framework & Web Components — OKLCH themes, container queries, 21 interactive components, optional CLI. Published on npm as @birdapi/velinstyle.

Website:
https://skylitedesign.github.io/velinstyle/

Topics (comma-separated):
css
accessibility
a11y
wcag
web-components
design-system
design-tokens
oklch
container-queries
css-framework
mit

# Make repository public
Settings → General → Danger zone → Change repository visibility → Public

# Enable GitHub Pages
Settings → Pages → Build and deployment → Source: GitHub Actions
(Workflow "Deploy Documentation" runs on push to main)
